referenceSource.note: chisq.test(matrix(c(10,0,20,0,15,0), nrow=2)): row of zeros → expected frequencies=0, chi-square=NaN. R returns NaN with warning.

description: Chi-square independence test with an entire row of zeros (empty factor level). Expected frequencies become 0 → division by zero.

datasets.name: zero_row
datasets.source: synthetic: row 2 has all zero counts

cases.description: Chi-square with zero-count row (should return NaN or error, not crash)
